results.title: cowboy-turnaround-sheet
results.prompt:
Image 1 is the cowboy character reference.
Image 2 is a style reference.

Generate a CHARACTER MODEL SHEET of the cowboy from Image 1: the same character shown from four angles in a single row on a clean neutral cream background — front view, three-quarter front view, side profile, and back view. Neutral standing pose, arms relaxed at sides. Identical costume across all four views: hat, neck scarf, jacket, holster belt, trousers, boots. Even flat studio lighting, no dramatic shadows, no environment, no props beyond the costume.

Preserve from Image 1: face structure, beard pattern, hat shape, scarf, jacket, build, weathered look.
Borrow from Image 2: ink wash treatment, loose linework, duotone sepia/olive palette, cross-hatch shadow.
Do NOT borrow from Image 2: subject, composition, scene elements, background, other characters.

16:9 aspect ratio.

resolved_params.system_prompt: STYLE: European bande dessinée ink wash. Duotone palette — warm cream paper + sepia/olive ink. Loose confident linework, cross-hatch for shadow and material texture. No vibrant color, no rendered polish, no photographic detail. This is a clean character model sheet — flat even lighting, neutral background, no mood.
